subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. Jan. 1909
subcodes.first_line: When We came to 'Akká, grievous were the hardships, yet how glorious it was! [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: وقتی که ما آمدیم عکا زحمت های شدیدی داشت آما چقدر خوب بود
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @degrees of faith; certitude, @spiritual transformation, @banishment to; life in 'Akka, @suffering and imprisonment
